title: Meeting, Convention, and Event Planners
description: Coordinate activities of staff, convention personnel, or clients to make arrangements for group meetings, events, or conventions.

tasks.text: Consult with customers to determine objectives and requirements for events, such as meetings, conferences, and conventions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review event bills for accuracy and approve payment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Coordinate services for events, such as accommodation and transportation for participants, facilities, catering, signage, displays, special needs requirements, printing and event security.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange the availability of audio-visual equipment, transportation, displays, and other event needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with staff at a chosen event site to coordinate details.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect event facilities to ensure that they conform to customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain records of event aspects, including financial details.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor event activities to ensure compliance with applicable regulations and laws, satisfaction of participants, and resolution of any problems that arise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Negotiate contracts with such service providers and suppliers as hotels, convention centers, and speakers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate and select providers of services according to customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan and develop programs, agendas, budgets, and services according to customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Hire, train, and supervise volunteers and support staff required for events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct post-event evaluations to determine how future events could be improved.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct administrative details, such as financial operations, dissemination of promotional materials, and responses to inquiries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with sponsors and organizing committees to plan scope and format of events, to establish and monitor budgets, or to review administrative procedures and event progress.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read trade publications, attend seminars, and consult with other meeting professionals to keep abreast of meeting management standards and trends.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize registration of event participants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop event topics and choose featured speakers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Promote conference, convention and trades show services by performing tasks such as meeting with professional and trade associations, and producing brochures and other publications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and implement efforts to publicize events and promote sponsorships.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain permits from fire and health departments to erect displays and exhibits and serve food at events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
